prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e5c44e8f`.
codex_response:
Rule: start from the lone green cell and trace a clockwise square spiral with run lengths `2,2,4,4,6,6,...`, painting green on in-bounds cells and stopping permanently just before the first red cell the path would enter. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched all official examples; no correction note was needed.

Validation passed: `4/4` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and I visually checked a generated preview sheet. The generator stays in-family by keeping the grids at `11x11`, placing one near-central green anchor, using sparse red singleton blockers, and mixing early-stop, medium-stop, and no-stop spirals. No new shared primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`; I only added a task-local ordered-path helper.
